title: Create foundry expansion discovery workflow
summary: Create a workflow for inspecting the current foundry and identifying high-value additions such as new skills, validators, references, fixtures, or project workflow patterns before implementation work begins.
acceptance_criteria: grilling identifies the operator job for discovering what else belongs in the foundry
the workflow distinguishes candidate skill additions, validator additions, reference material, fixtures, and project tracker improvements
the workflow defines an evidence gate for deciding whether a candidate should become a task
the workflow preserves Matt Pocock style and ECC workflow architecture
the workflow produces a reviewable output artifact before any implementation artifacts are approved

context_snapshot.summary: Load workflow-foundry state, all non-done tasks, and Matt/ECC workflow references before shaping a foundry expansion discovery workflow.

session_log.event: Created intake task for a foundry expansion discovery workflow.
Moved to grilling after user asked to grill the foundry expansion discovery workflow.

Resolved operator job: inspect current foundry repo state across projects, skills, validators, trackers, and gaps, then produce a ranked shortlist of candidate workflow additions with evidence, expected value, and the next tracker task to create.
